allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from github_pr_kb.extractor import GitHubExtractor, is_noise, SKIP_BOT_LOGINS; print\('extractor OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from github_pr_kb.models import PRRecord, CommentRecord, PRFile; print\('models OK'\)")
Bash(GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_test .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from github_pr_kb.extractor import GitHubExtractor, is_noise, SKIP_BOT_LOGINS; print\('extractor OK'\)")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for test suite and linting' --body ':*)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; comments=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{c[\\"user\\"][\\"login\\"]}: {c[\\"body\\"]}'\) for c in comments]")
